g.text: VS Code sandboxes webviews in iframes
Lock file is a regular file —
Why three? Windows FileSystemWatcher doesn't reliably
detect changes through symlinks. Shell integration requires
VS Code 1.93+. Timeout catches all remaining edge cases.
